## Identifiers

Identifiers allow to assign a referential keys for some kind of identifiers,
which should be uniformly used across the document tree.
They are not bound to a location.

Command


<a id="symbol"></a>\n

this is term `ParseTerm`s.

Such identifiers are defined with the command `ident`. There are two flavors:
- definition by a static value

  <pre>
  {{ident}{<key>}{value>}&rcub;
  </pre>
  
- definition by a value provided by some include. This flavor uses the
  [include](commands.md#include) syntax.

  <pre>
  {{ident}{<key>}{include}{<file>}{<selection key>}{<regexp>}&rcub;
  </pre>

The value can zthen be used somewhere in the document tree by
a simplified ìdent` command without the definition part:

 <pre>
  {{ident}{<key}&rcub;
 <pre>
